subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! How can I make mention of those who are wronged in Thy path and those who are afflicted in their love for Thee? Among them, O my God, are multitudes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی کیف اذکر المظلومین فی سبیلک و المبتلین فی محبتک منهم یا الهی ملا
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences
